# ToolsOfSaaS - Core Directory & Resources

> ToolsOfSaaS is a curated directory of browser-based utilities and software-as-a-service (SaaS) tools designed to streamline daily workflows for developers, designers, teachers, and teams.

## Navigation & Discovery
- [Homepage](https://toolsofsaas.com/)
- [Sitemap](https://toolsofsaas.com/sitemap.xml)
- [About Us](https://toolsofsaas.com/about)
- [Contact Information](https://toolsofsaas.com/contact)
- [Official Blog](https://toolsofsaas.com/blog)

## Curated Tools & Utilities
- [Random Team Generator & Multiday Planner](https://toolsofsaas.com/tools/team-planner): An advanced random grouping tool and multiday scheduler. It automatically runs sorting loops to minimize teammate repeat matches, ensuring diverse peer collaborations in classrooms, projects, sprints, and speed networking workshops.

- [Privacy Policy](https://toolsofsaas.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://toolsofsaas.com/terms)
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://toolsofsaas.com/affiliate-disclosure)
